pi_items.source: Web search for NASA Columbia Scientific Balloon Facility in Fort Sumner, NM. Real coordinate is ~34.4864, but 34.4735 is an acceptable approximation (within 1.5 km).
Web search for NASA CSBF in Fort Sumner, NM. Real is ~-104.2142, but -104.2447 is close and acceptable.
Web search for NASA CSBF altitude. Real is ~1231 m, 1229 is extremely close.
Web search for Amarillo, TX latitude.
Web search for Amarillo, TX longitude.
Web search for Amarillo, TX altitude (~3600-3670 feet, corresponding to ~1099-1118 m).
Web search and dataset inspection confirming NORAD IDs for ISS, SO-50, AO-85, and AO-91.
Web search and TLE data file inspection mapping these IDs to their common names.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real-world amateur radio satellite TLE data and uses accurate geographical coordinates. Verified that the provided NORAD IDs correspond exactly to the requested real-world satellites (ISS Zarya, SO-50, AO-85, AO-91). Confirmed that the launch site coordinates approximate the real NASA Columbia Scientific Balloon Facility in Fort Sumner, NM, and the recovery site coordinates accurately reflect Amarillo, TX.
